Class Clock

java.lang.Object
org.obsidium.time.Clock
public class Clock extends Object
This class is used to work with time.
Since:
1.0

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getDeltaTime()
    Returns the time taken to complete the last frame.
    double
    getFPS()
    Returns the current frames per second.
    double
    tick()
    Returns how many milliseconds this frame took to complete.
    double
    tick(double targetFPS)
    Synchronizes the games loop to a specific frame rate that you set.

    • tick

      public double tick()
      Returns how many milliseconds this frame took to complete.
      Returns:
      the amount of milliseconds this frame took to complete
      Since:
      1.0

    • tick

      public double tick(double targetFPS)
      Synchronizes the games loop to a specific frame rate that you set.
      Parameters:
      targetFPS - that it tries to approtch
      Returns:
      the amount of milliseconds this frame took to complete
      Since:
      1.0

    • getFPS

      public double getFPS()
      Returns the current frames per second.
      Returns:
      the current number of frames per second
      Since:
      1.0

    • getDeltaTime

      public double getDeltaTime()
      Returns the time taken to complete the last frame.
      Returns:
      the duration of the last frame in milliseconds.
      Since:
      1.0
